entries.title: FRAGMENTS ON BARUCH 2:18 on baruch 2:18
entries.excerpt: Those who carry a great weight bend over due to their weakness. And the soul that is tormented and greatly saddened by its sins also confesses to be bowed down and weak.

entries.title: FRAGMENTS ON BARUCH 2:18 on baruch 2:18
entries.excerpt: Their eyes are failing perhaps in a concrete sense, due to misfortune, or perhaps it refers to those whose minds are darkened and do not reason.
